subcodes.first_line: Praise be unto God that thou hast turned unto Him and attained unto that whereof the divines and notables of Persia have been deprived [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: لله الحمد اقبال نمودی و فائز شدی بانچه که علمای ایران و رجالش از آن محروم و
subcodes.subjects: @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @firmness in the Covenant
